title: Events
description: Manage your events and race registrations.

metadata.title: Events | RunGoMX
metadata.description: Manage your events and race registrations on RunGoMX.

comingSoon: Events management is coming soon. This feature is currently under development.

emptyState.title: No events yet
emptyState.description: Create your first event to start managing registrations.

createEvent.title: Create event
createEvent.description: Set up a new event for your organization.

organization.title: Select organization
organization.description: Choose the organization that will host this event, or create a new one.

errors.slugTaken: This organization URL is already in use. Try a different slug.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to create an organization here.
errors.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Sign in again and try once more.
errors.validationFailed: Review the organization details and try again.

event.title: Event details
event.descriptionPlaceholder: Share what makes this event special...
event.descriptionHelper: A short draft is enough for now. Cover the format, location, and what makes it special. Example: "Trail half marathon in Valle de Bravo with forest routes, live timing, and a family-friendly finish festival."
event.aiContextDescription: Optional for Pro. Share organizer-only notes so the wizard can draft with better context later.
event.aiContextPlaceholder: Example: Boutique trail weekend in Valle de Bravo for intermediate runners. We want a premium feel, partner activations, camping, and polished website copy.
event.aiContextHelper: Internal notes are fine. This field is not public and can be messy.

errors.seriesCreateFailed: We couldn't create the event series. Try again in a moment.
errors.editionCreateFailed: We couldn't create the event draft. Try again in a moment.
errors.seriesSlugTaken: This series URL is already in use. Choose a different slug.
errors.editionSlugTaken: This edition URL is already in use. Choose a different slug.
errors.editionLabelTaken: This edition label is already being used in the selected series.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to create this event.
errors.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Sign in again and try once more.
errors.validationFailed: Review the event details and try again.

filters.title: Quick search
filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by event, organization, or location

noResults.title: No matching events
noResults.description: Try adjusting your filters or clearing the search.

slugStatus.error: Could not verify; will validate on submit

detail.manageEventDescription: Edit event details, dates, and registration settings
detail.manageFaqDescription: Add and edit frequently asked questions
detail.managePoliciesDescription: Set refund, transfer, and deferral placeholders
detail.manageWebsiteDescription: Customize your event page sections and content
detail.managePricingDescription: Set early bird and tiered pricing schedules
detail.viewPublicPageDescription: See how your event appears to participants
detail.noDistances: No distances added yet. Go to settings to add distances.

resultsWorkspace.title: Results workspace
resultsWorkspace.description: Trust-state foundations for capture, import, and review lanes.

stateRail.title: Results state rail
stateRail.description: Draft/official lifecycle, connectivity, unsynced count, and next action are always visible.
stateRail.connectivityOfflineHint: Local-first mode with protected draft data.

versionVisibility.title: Official version visibility
versionVisibility.description: Track the active Official version and prior lifecycle history for this edition.
versionVisibility.empty: No result versions are available for this edition yet.

table.title: Draft results table
table.description: Core trust semantics stay visible in both Compact and Full modes.
table.empty: No draft rows available yet. Start capture or import to seed this table.

fallbackRows.defaultDetails: Draft result row available in organizer workflow.

capture.savedLocally: Saved locally from mobile capture session.

import.parsed: Parsed from latest CSV draft import.
import.duplicateBib: Duplicate bib conflict flagged for review.

review.ready: Draft row ready for final organizer review.
review.pendingConflict: Pending conflict resolution before final review.

conflict.message: Conflict resolution is still required for this draft row.
conflict.guidance: Resolve the explicit sync conflict before attempting finalization.

pendingSync.message: This row is still pending synchronization.
pendingSync.guidance: Run deterministic sync until pending rows reach synced state.

missingFinishTime.message: Finish status row is missing a finish time.
missingFinishTime.guidance: Provide a valid finish time before continuing to finalization.

statusTimeMismatch.message: Non-finish status row still includes a finish time value.
statusTimeMismatch.guidance: Confirm the status/time combination is intentional before publishing.

empty.safe: No draft rows are ready for review yet.
empty.next: Start capture or import to create a draft before publishing official results.

details.draftProtection: Draft rows remain protected until an organizer publishes an Official version.
details.blockersWarningsSummary: Once draft rows exist, blockers and warnings will be summarized here.

blockers.safe: Official output is protected while this draft is under review.
blockers.next: Resolve blockers before publishing official results.

details.blockerCount: {count, plural, one {# blocker must be resolved before publishing.} other {# blockers must be resolved before publishing.}}
details.warningCount: {count, plural, one {# warning should be reviewed before publishing.} other {# warnings should be reviewed before publishing.}}

warnings.safe: Draft is protected and can still be adjusted before it becomes Official.
warnings.next: Review warnings, then publish official results when appropriate.

details.warningCount: {count, plural, one {# warning is present in this draft.} other {# warnings are present in this draft.}}
details.warningsNonBlocking: Warnings do not necessarily block publication, but should be confirmed intentionally.

syncPending.safe: Captured rows stay in Draft and are saved locally.
syncPending.next: Reconnect and run sync to upload pending entries.

details.rowsWaitingForSync: {count, plural, one {# row is waiting for sync.} other {# rows are waiting for sync.}}
details.noPublicChanges: No public or official records were changed.

blocked.safe: Draft capture remains protected while blockers are unresolved.
blocked.next: Resolve conflicts/blockers, then re-run sync and review.

details.conflictCount: {count, plural, one {# row requires conflict confirmation.} other {# rows require conflict confirmation.}}
details.blockerCount: {count, plural, one {# blocker is still present in the draft.} other {# blockers are still present in the draft.}}

warnings.safe: Draft capture is protected and can be refined before review.
warnings.next: Review warnings, then move to the Review lane.

details.warningCount: {count, plural, one {# warning is present in the draft.} other {# warnings are present in the draft.}}
details.warningsDoNotPublish: Warnings do not publish data, but should be reviewed before publishing official results.

blocked.safe: Draft import is protected and not public yet.
blocked.next: Resolve conflicts/blockers, then review the draft before publishing.

details.conflictCount: {count, plural, one {# row requires conflict resolution.} other {# rows require conflict resolution.}}
details.blockerCount: {count, plural, one {# blocker is still present in the draft.} other {# blockers are still present in the draft.}}

warnings.safe: Draft import is protected and can be refined before review.
warnings.next: Review warnings, then move to the Review lane.

details.warningCount: {count, plural, one {# warning is present in the draft.} other {# warnings are present in the draft.}}
details.warningsDoNotPublish: Warnings do not publish data, but should be reviewed before publishing official results.

capture.title: Capture lane
capture.description: Mobile-first, local-first draft capture with clear sync state.

import.title: Import lane
import.description: CSV/Excel ingestion with trust-state visibility and conflict cues.

review.title: Review lane
review.description: Unified draft review before publishing official results.

corrections.title: Corrections lane
corrections.description: Review pending correction requests and record organizer decisions with audit metadata.

investigation.title: Investigation lane
investigation.description: Consolidated internal view for version provenance and correction transitions.

corrections.title: Correction review queue
corrections.description: Pending requests are prioritized first. Review each request, then approve or reject with audit-ready attribution.
corrections.empty: No correction requests found for this edition.

audit.title: Correction audit trail
audit.description: Internal timeline linking each correction request to its published version transition.
audit.empty: No published correction transitions found for this edition.

metrics.title: Correction lifecycle metrics
metrics.description: Track correction SLA and trust operations using lifecycle timestamps.

aging.title: Pending aging buckets
aging.description: Aging highlights unresolved backlog risk and operational follow-up priority.

investigation.title: Internal investigation view
investigation.description: Trace version provenance and correction transitions without direct database access.
investigation.loadError: Investigation data could not be loaded right now. Try again in a moment.

selectedDiff.title: Selected version transition
selectedDiff.description: Use this summary to explain exactly what changed and who approved it.

versions.title: Version + provenance timeline
versions.description: Every result version includes source and ingestion provenance context.
versions.empty: No result versions found for this edition.

corrections.title: Correction transition timeline
corrections.description: Each approved correction links directly to a version transition context.
corrections.empty: No approved correction transitions found for this edition.

audit.title: Trust-critical audit logs
audit.description: Filter organizer trust actions by event, action type, and time window.
audit.empty: No trust-critical audit logs matched the selected filters.

reviewGate.title: Finalization readiness gate
reviewGate.description: Review blockers and warnings before publishing official results.
reviewGate.proceedBlockedMessage: Finalization is blocked until all blockers are resolved.
reviewGate.proceedReadyMessage: No blocking issues found. Draft review is ready for finalization.
reviewGate.proceedUnavailableMessage: No draft rows are available yet. Start capture or import first.
reviewGate.finalizeSuccessMessage: Official version published. Targeted results and rankings caches were invalidated.
reviewGate.issueListDescription: Open the remediation lane directly from each issue before finalization.
reviewGate.issueListEmpty: No unresolved review issues. You can continue to finalization.

captureEntry.title: Offline bib capture
captureEntry.description: Capture bib, time, and status in Draft even when connectivity is unstable.
captureEntry.validationBibRequired: Bib number is required before saving a draft entry.
captureEntry.validationFinishTimeInvalid: Finish status requires a valid finish time.
captureEntry.entrySaved: Entry saved locally in draft state.
captureEntry.entriesDescription: Status semantics are preserved and overall placement is derived from finish times only.
captureEntry.syncDescription: Sync pending draft rows idempotently. Retries continue from the last consistent checkpoint.
captureEntry.syncCompleteMessage: All pending entries were synced without duplication.
captureEntry.syncInterruptedMessage: Sync checkpoint saved after {processed} entries. Retry to continue the remaining {remaining}.
captureEntry.syncBlockedByConflicts: Resolve all pending conflicts before sync can complete.
captureEntry.conflictDescription: Compare local and server values side-by-side, then choose an explicit resolution for each conflict.

safeNextDetails.title: Guidance
safeNextDetails.safeMessage: Draft data remains protected while conflicts are unresolved.
safeNextDetails.nextMessage: Choose a resolution for every conflict and rerun sync.
safeNextDetails.detailDraftProtection: Official results remain unchanged until sync finalization.

importMapping.title: CSV/Excel mapping preview
importMapping.description: Upload a file, map source columns to canonical result fields, and keep mappings deterministic for downstream preview.
importMapping.templateSavedMessage: Template saved for this organizer scope.
importMapping.requiredMappingMessage: Map required canonical fields before saving a template.
importMapping.parsingMessage: Parsing file and extracting sample rows...
importMapping.mappingPreviewDescription: This explicit mapping is the contract used by downstream validation and preview.
importMapping.samplePreviewDescription: Use sample rows to verify column assignments before continuing.
importMapping.validationDescription: Blockers must be resolved before draft preview; warnings stay visible as non-blocking guidance.
importMapping.derivedPreviewDescription: When blockers are clear, this preview shows how rows will appear before publish.
importMapping.derivedPreviewBlocked: Resolve blockers to unlock draft preview.
importMapping.derivedPreviewEmpty: No mapped rows available for preview yet.

parseErrors.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported file type. Upload a .csv, .xls, or .xlsx file.
parseErrors.fileTooLarge: The file exceeds the 5MB limit. Split it and retry.
parseErrors.emptyFile: The uploaded file is empty. Add data rows and upload again.
parseErrors.missingHeaders: No headers were found. Add a header row before uploading.
parseErrors.duplicateHeaders: Duplicate headers were detected. Rename duplicates and retry.
parseErrors.malformedFile: The file could not be parsed. Verify formatting and retry.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Add questions and answers that will be displayed on your event page.
faq.emptyState: No FAQ items yet. Add your first question to help participants understand your event.

waivers.title: Waivers
waivers.description: Create waivers that participants must accept before registering.
waivers.emptyState: No waivers yet. Add your first waiver to collect participant consent.

policies.title: Policies
policies.description: Add placeholders for refund, transfer, and deferral policies.

deferral.title: Deferral policy
deferral.description: Explain deferral or credit rules and deadlines.

questions.title: Registration Questions
questions.description: Create custom questions participants answer during registration.
questions.sectionDescription: These questions appear in the registration flow.
questions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this question? This action cannot be undone.
questions.emptyStateDescription: Add questions to collect additional information from participants.

form.promptPlaceholder: e.g., What is your shirt size?
form.helpTextPlaceholder: Optional hint shown below the question
form.optionsHint: Single select questions require at least 2 options.

pricing.title: Pricing Tiers
pricing.description: Manage pricing tiers for each distance. Set early bird pricing, regular pricing, and late registration fees.
pricing.selectDistance: Select a distance to manage pricing
pricing.noDistances: No distances available. Add distances in event settings first.

tier.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this pricing tier?
tier.cannotDeleteLast: Each distance must have at least one pricing tier.
tier.startsAtHint: Leave empty for no start date restriction
tier.endsAtHint: Leave empty for no end date restriction
tier.dateOverlap: Date range overlaps with another tier

help.title: How pricing tiers work
help.description: Create multiple pricing tiers to offer early bird discounts or increase prices as the event date approaches. Only one tier can be active at a time based on the date ranges you set.

addOns.title: Add-ons
addOns.description: Create additional products or donations that participants can select during registration.
addOns.emptyState: No add-ons configured yet. Create your first add-on to offer merchandise or accept donations.

addOn.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this add-on and all its options?

option.title: Options
option.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this option?
option.count: {count, plural, =0 {0 options} one {# option} other {# options}}
option.emptyState: No options yet. Add options with different sizes or variations.

help.title: How add-ons work
help.description: Add-ons allow you to sell merchandise (like t-shirts) or accept donations during registration. Each add-on can have multiple options with different prices.

coupons.title: Discount Coupons
coupons.description: Create promotional codes that participants can use to get discounts on registration.
coupons.emptyStateDescription: Create your first coupon to offer discounts to participants.

coupon.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this coupon? This action cannot be undone.
coupon.codeCannotChange: Code cannot be changed after creation
coupon.name: Internal name

help.title: How coupons work
help.description: Coupons let you offer percentage discounts to participants. Set optional validity dates and redemption limits to control when and how often the code can be used.

editions.title: Editions
editions.description: Manage editions for this event series and clone a new year.

seriesSlug.title: Series URL slug
seriesSlug.description: Changing the series slug creates permanent redirects for all editions.
seriesSlug.redirectInfo: All old edition links are automatically forwarded to the new URLs.

confirm.title: Update series URL?
confirm.description: We’ll automatically forward all old edition links to the new URLs, so existing shares and marketing keep working.

editions.listDescription: Clone an existing edition into a new year.

clone.title: Clone {editionLabel}
clone.description: Creates a new draft edition and copies distances, pricing, content, and policies.

fields.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

groupRegistrations.title: Group registrations
groupRegistrations.description: Upload a CSV or Excel (.xlsx) file to create multiple registrations at once.

template.title: Template
template.description: Download the Excel (.xlsx) template (or CSV) and fill it with participant data.

discountRule.title: Group discounts
discountRule.description: Configure automatic discounts based on number of participants in the batch.

errors.minParticipants: Minimum participants must be a positive number
errors.percentOff: Percent off must be between 1 and 100

upload.title: Upload
upload.description: Upload a CSV or Excel (.xlsx) file and validate all rows before processing.

errors.noFile: Select a CSV or Excel (.xlsx) file to upload

batches.title: Batches
batches.description: Select a batch to review validation and processing results.

batch.title: Batch details
batch.selectToView: Select a batch to view details.
batch.hasErrors: This batch has validation errors and cannot be processed.
batch.validated: This batch is validated and ready to process.
batch.failedProcessing: This batch failed to process. Review capacity and try again.

uploadLinks.title: Group upload links
uploadLinks.description: Create and manage external upload links for coordinators.
uploadLinks.createdDescription: Copy the link and share it with the coordinator. This token is only shown once.

fields.name: Label (optional)
fields.paymentResponsibilityHelp: Payments aren’t collected in-app yet; this controls confirmation behavior and future payment flow.
